title: Canvas content template spec
description: Authored Canvas content template format. Workbench normalizes this into an @json-render/react-compatible spec by synthesizing the canvas:component-tree root wrapper. Bindings are expressed as prop-source objects: `{"sourceType": "entity-field", "expression": "…"}` for field bindings, `{"sourceType": "host-entity-url", "absolute": false}` for the host entity URL, etc. Plain literal values (strings, numbers, booleans, objects without a `sourceType` key) are sent as-is — Drupal wraps them as static prop sources at resolve time.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor tooling.

label.description: Human-readable label. Workbench shows this in the sidebar.

entityType.description: Entity type the template targets (e.g. node).

bundle.description: Entity bundle the template targets (e.g. article).

viewMode.description: View mode the template targets (e.g. full, teaser).

elements.description: Authored template elements. Workbench preserves key insertion order when synthesizing canvas:component-tree children.

props.description: Prop values keyed by prop name. Each value is either a literal (string/number/boolean/array/null/object without `sourceType`) or a prop-source object (object containing a string `sourceType` field).

propValue.description: A literal value or a prop-source object.

sourceType.description: Prop source discriminator. Either a bare type (`entity-field`, `host-entity-url`, `default-relative-url`) or a colon-prefixed form (`static:<field_type>:<column>`, `adapter:<plugin_id>`).
